description: Recto: Literary text in Hebrew. Verso: Literary text in Judaeo-Arabic. The excerpt is either from Kitab Zahr al-Ādāb wa-Thamar al-Albāb by al-Ḥuṣarī al-Qayrawānī (d. 1061 CE) or from the source that he quotes, Abū l-Faḍl al-Mīkālī (d. 1045 CE). ASE
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
